Description:
Provides functionality to copy text to the clipboard and optionally display a snackbar notification.
Remarks: This component uses JavaScript interop to perform clipboard operations. It does not generate anything in the DOM but provides a public method to copy something to clipboard. It ensures JSInterop is available before the copy and advises if not.

Parameters.Name: Snackbar
Parameters.Description:
Indicates if the snackbar should be shown as a result of a copy operation. A success will be Severity.Success and an error will be Severity.Error.
Remarks: Default is false

PublicFields.Name: IsJSRuntimeAvailable
PublicFields.Description: Indicates if the JSRuntime is available and the CopyToClipboardAsync method can be called

Methods.Name: CopyToClipboardAsync
Methods.Description: Copies the Text parameter to the clipboard
